{{Quote|Caf, please. And kruffy pot pie.|Ben Skywalker|<ref name="exile" />}}
'''Kruffy pot pie''', also spelled '''kruffy potpie''', was a savory [[Foodstuff/Legends|dish]] [[Diet/Legends|edible]] by [[Human/Legends|Humans]]. The [[Pie/Legends|pie's]] thick [[pastry shell]] was stuffed with [[Bird/Legends|fowl]] meat, [[Vegetable/Legends|vegetables]], and [[Gravy/Legends|gravy]].<ref name="exile" /> In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]],<ref name="date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'', which include the mention of kruffy pot [[Pie/Legends|pie]], to [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]].</ref> the Human [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Ben Skywalker]] ordered kruffy pot pie along with [[Caf/Legends|caf]] when he visited a sidewalk café while on [[Drewwa]], the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Almania]]. After eating his kruffy pot pie, he felt well fed.<ref name="exile" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kruffy pot pie was mentioned in the [[2007]] novel ''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'', written by [[Aaron Allston]] as the fourth installment of the ''[[Star Wars: Legacy of the Force]]'' series.<ref name="exile" />
